brief.empty: No comms in the next 14 days
brief.emptyDesc: Enjoy the silence or plan something new

modal.bodyPlaceholder: Write the content or brief for this communication...

insights.activeDay: most active day of the week

dm.importDesc: CSV with columns: Title, Date, Country, Channel, Segment, Topic, Format, Language, Scope, Status, Featured

admin.noUsersHint: Check the RLS policies on the profiles table in Supabase.

about.tagline: Centralized platform for planning, managing and tracking all internal BSG communications globally and locally.

super_admin.label: Super Admin
super_admin.desc: You can view and edit all communications across all countries. You manage users, channels, segments and global system configuration.
actions: ✦ Create, edit and delete any communication
✦ Full access to Dashboard and Data Master
✦ Import and export communications via CSV

country_admin.label: Country Admin
country_admin.desc: You can view and edit communications for your country plus global ones (GL). You can approve and publish local communications.
actions: ✦ Create, edit and approve comms for your country
✦ Use Briefing to plan your day

editor.label: Editor
editor.desc: You can create and edit communications across all countries, but cannot delete them. You have full visibility of the calendar and dashboard.

viewer.label: Viewer
viewer.desc: You have read-only access to your country's communications and global ones (GL). You can browse the calendar, Briefing and view the Dashboard.
actions: · No access to Data Master or Admin

roleDescs.super_admin: Full access. Views and edits all comms across all countries. Manages users, channels and configuration.
roleDescs.country_admin: Views and edits comms for their country + GL. Can approve and publish local communications.
roleDescs.editor: Can create and edit comms but not delete. Views all communications.
roleDescs.viewer: Read-only. Views their country's comms + GL but cannot modify them.

cal.title: Calendar
cal.subtitle: Week · Day · Month view
cal.desc: Plan and visualize all internal and external communications by channel and country. Drag & drop to move dates, filter by country, channel and status.
tips: Week and day view for daily use
Click on the date to navigate quickly
Traffic light 🚩 when a country is saturated

brief.title: Briefing
brief.subtitle: Next 14 days
brief.desc: Daily summary of everything going out. Ideal for starting the day knowing exactly what's being sent, through which channel and to which segment.

map.title: Dashboard
map.subtitle: KPIs · Trends · Insights
map.desc: Key metrics for your communication planning: total comms, approval rate, most used channels, country distribution and monthly evolution.
tips: Filters by country, channel, status and topic

data.title: Data Master
data.subtitle: Table · Export · Import
data.desc: Tabular view of all communications. Search, filter, inline edit. Import from CSV and export the planning with date and country filters.
tips: Export with date and country filters

notif.title: Notifications
notif.subtitle: Smart alerts
notif.desc: Contextual alert center that notifies you about overdue comms, pending approval, scheduled for today or in draft for tomorrow.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Users · Config · Audit
admin.desc: User, country, channel and segment management panel. Includes full change audit log and password reset.

global.title: Multi-country
global.subtitle: Global · Local · Filters
global.desc: Each user automatically sees their country's communications + GL (Global). Super admins see everything. The pre-filter is configurable.
tips: Saturation visible by country and day
